description_long: This is a slender, metallic screwdriver with a cylindrical shaft and a pointed tip. The handle is straight and features alternating vertical bands of gold and silver, giving it a visually striking, industrial appearance. The shaft and tip are metallic, with the tip tapering to a fine point, suggesting precision work. The handle appears to be made of metal, possibly brass or steel, and is capped with a rounded metallic base. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ergonomic padding or grip enhancements. There are no visible brand markings or signs of wear, and the surface finish is smooth and reflective.
description: A slim, metallic screwdriver with a gold and silver striped handle and a pointed metallic tip. The design is sleek and industrial, with a smooth, reflective finish.
description_view_0: The screwdriver is seen from the front, showing the full length of the gold and silver striped handle and the pointed metallic tip.
description_view_1: This view shows the screwdriver slightly rotated, maintaining the visibility of the striped handle and the pointed tip, with subtle changes in the light reflection.
description_view_2: The screwdriver is viewed from another side, with the striped handle and pointed tip still prominent, and the base cap clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view presents the screwdriver from the opposite side, again highlighting the striped handle and the metallic tip, with the same smooth finish.
attribute_handle_type: straight, metallic, gold and silver striped, smooth surface, no visible ergonomic features
